title: run.cancel.requested
description: Phase 6 extension of Section 11's event table, mirroring the existing approval.decided row (API -> orchestrator, same producer/consumer direction and purpose class: a human/API decision affecting an in-flight run). Published by POST /api/v1/runs/{id}/cancel after the run has already been transitioned to CANCELLED, so the orchestrator can kill the process tree for a run it is actively processing. Consumed by talos.orchestrator.cancellations. Documented as a deviation in docs/phase-reports/phase-6-report.md.
